title: Configurable MaceLimiter
description:
lost the source code, this may be revived some day.

MaceLimiter lets you limit the amount of maces that can exist in your server!
body:
MaceLimiter is a lightweight plugin for Minecraft servers that limits the number of craftable maces to a configurable maximum. It assigns each crafted mace a unique ID and tracks them across restarts. If a mace is destroyed (e.g. in lava, fire, or by breaking), it is automatically removed from the list, allowing a new one to be crafted.

Perfect for PvP-balanced servers that want to:

Prevent mace overuse

Encourage resource management

Add rarity to powerful items

Features:

Configurable max number of maces (config.yml)

Persistent tracking (via maces.yml)

Illegal mace detection and removal

Auto-blocking auto-crafting systems

Broadcast notifications when maces are destroyed
